programme.title: Back For You Ep04
programme.desc: After a harrowing escape from a gang, Officer A Lai obtains clues for his cases from an unlikely source: the comics belonging to his rescuer, who has fallen into a coma due to her injuries.

programme.title: Back For You Ep05
programme.desc: After a harrowing escape from a gang, Officer A Lai obtains clues for his cases from an unlikely source: the comics belonging to his rescuer, who has fallen into a coma due to her injuries.

programme.title: Our Dazzling Days Ep23
programme.desc: Orphan Zhang Xiao Man grows up in the factory town alongside Yan Xiao Dan and Xia Lei, navigating friendship, first love, and challenges, as they pursue dreams amid the factories' decline.

programme.title: Our Dazzling Days Ep24
programme.desc: Orphan Zhang Xiao Man grows up in the factory town alongside Yan Xiao Dan and Xia Lei, navigating friendship, first love, and challenges, as they pursue dreams amid the factories' decline.

programme.title: Our Dazzling Days Ep25
programme.desc: Orphan Zhang Xiao Man grows up in the factory town alongside Yan Xiao Dan and Xia Lei, navigating friendship, first love, and challenges, as they pursue dreams amid the factories' decline.

programme.title: To the Wonder Ep02
programme.desc: After failing to realise her literary dreams in the big city, Li Wen Xiu reluctantly returns to her mother. But meeting Kazakh boy Batay reminded Wen Xiu of the beauty of her hometown in Altay.

programme.title: To the Wonder Ep03
programme.desc: After failing to realise her literary dreams in the big city, Li Wen Xiu reluctantly returns to her mother. But meeting Kazakh boy Batay reminded Wen Xiu of the beauty of her hometown in Altay.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep01
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep02
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: Bride And The Beast
programme.desc: Every year, a young girl must be sacrificed to the mountain god or a curse would befall their small village. Two young men must now rescue their beloved when she is chosen to be sacrifice.

programme.title: Special Monster
programme.desc: Gao Cheng set sail in search of an ancient ship carrying countless treasures that mysteriously vanished, only to end up on a mysterious island inhabited by a primitive tribe & alien creatures.

programme.title: Mrs. Golden Snake
programme.desc: The Sword Sect faces Lady Golden Snake's revival after her seal breaks. Demon Qu Ling and disciple Bian Xiaoya unite to reclaim the sword and seal her.

programme.title: Peak Confrontation
programme.desc: Gangster Chu Tian Kuo involuntarily participates in a competition to win the golden mask. But during the struggle for the mask, he is framed & subsequently rescued by the princess of a foreign tribe.

programme.title: Horror Legend Of Miao Ling
programme.desc: After the deaths of several people, allegedly from the Gu curse, Lu Wen Liang & Zhang Chi Yi venture into the secluded village in the mountains to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Guardian Of Graveyard
programme.desc: Treasure hunters Xun Ye, Feng Yao, Cai Qing Yun, Wang Ya Zi & others encounter various dangers as they seek treasure at Qinling Phoenix Mountain, even averting conspiracies & diplomatic issues.

programme.title: This Thriving Land Ep09
programme.desc: Portraying the rise and fall of the Ning, Feng & Fei families across two generations, as well as their entwined fates and enduring bonds forged by their struggle & love for the same land they call home.

programme.title: This Thriving Land Ep10
programme.desc: Portraying the rise and fall of the Ning, Feng & Fei families across two generations, as well as their entwined fates and enduring bonds forged by their struggle & love for the same land they call home.

programme.title: 2025 iQIYI Scream Night
programme.desc: Yang Mi wins Scream Actor of the Year, while Bai Lu wins Scream Actress of the Year for the 2nd time, with stars like Zhang Ling He, Liu Yu Ning, Li Xian, Zhao Jin Mai and more lighting up the stage.

programme.title: Snake
programme.desc: Despite the stories of a snake woman who devours those who venture into the mountains, the owner of the snake factory ignores the warning, leading his team into forbidden grounds.

programme.title: Salt Lake Project
programme.desc: A fool searching for his missing lover unexpectedly encounters a rogue who has lost himself. With an old, broken truck, they embark on a journey filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Second Life
programme.desc: Years ago, a little boy is born in prison and his mother was forced to give him up, losing all contact with him. When she is released, she tries her best to make amends to rebuild their relationship.

programme.title: Extreme Speed Police-The War on Drugs
programme.desc: Based on a true drug case, this gripping tale follows anti-narcotics officers risking their lives in deadly missions, vowing to wipe out drugs and safeguard the peace of the people.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep03
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep04
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: Drug Storm
programme.desc: Vice-captain Xiao Ruolan falls into a trap at the border. Her substitute joins the police to fight Chen Qiang. Real vs fake, bullets fly—who will survive and have the last laugh?

programme.title: Mi Wu Ci Sha
programme.desc: The daughter of a late great general embarks on a journey for revenge when she discovers that the mastermind to the murder of her biological father is her foster father, the Prime Minister.

programme.title: The Deadly Pursuer
programme.desc: While police captain Fang Yu is leading murder investigation at a forest farm in Long'an City, auxiliary police officer Cui Xiao Tian, who is investigating a hit-&-run, also becomes embroiled in it.

programme.title: Restart Tomorrow
programme.desc: Pei Hong Xiao is ordered to lead his teammates in a battle against dangerous mutant creatures while purifying the earth & searching for water contamination chips in the space station.

programme.title: Qimen Mechanism Volume
programme.desc: The mysterious appearance of the Qi Men Mechanism Scroll in the Ghost Valley tomb had both the Qi and Chu kingdoms compete to obtain the treasure, resulting in heavy casualties on both sides.

programme.title: The Chi Dragon Slash
programme.desc: At the end of the Tang Dynasty, Navy General Qian Liu set off to exterminate the river pirates, only to discover a mystical two-headed beast called the Chi dragon in a cave.

programme.title: This Thriving Land Ep11
programme.desc: Portraying the rise and fall of the Ning, Feng & Fei families across two generations, as well as their entwined fates and enduring bonds forged by their struggle & love for the same land they call home.

programme.title: This Thriving Land Ep12
programme.desc: Portraying the rise and fall of the Ning, Feng & Fei families across two generations, as well as their entwined fates and enduring bonds forged by their struggle & love for the same land they call home.

programme.title: Blade Of Fury
programme.desc: Pei Xing is famous for being an 'unkillable' & cold-blooded assassin. But after witnessing great injustice, his dormant chivalry gradually awakens and he decides to retaliate in kind.

programme.title: No information available
programme.desc: No information available

programme.title: The Cursed Village
programme.desc: On their wedding night, Liu Jin is killed and Shen Xiu Xiu assaulted. Soon, men in Fengming Village die mysteriously in bridal attire. Chu Qi & Xu Yi Ming search for her sister and uncover the truth.
